hook: My landlord said I can't change anything...
base_scene: A small cluttered home office with a cheap desk, tangled cables, poor lighting, a window with blinds, a rolling office chair, and a bookshelf against the wall. The room is approximately 10x10 feet with beige carpet.
slide_styles: Current messy state — cluttered desk, tangled cables, dim overhead light, papers everywhere
Clean minimalist Scandinavian — white desk, cable management, warm lamp, plants, light wood accents

Cozy creative studio — standing desk, mood lighting, art on walls, warm tones, organized shelves
High-tech futuristic — LED strips, ultrawide monitor, smart lights, floating shelves, dark minimal
Japandi zen — low desk, natural materials, shoji screen, bonsai, neutral palette, floor cushion
